IMPORTANT - Eventual Consistency and Polling (FR-013, FR-013c):
- After write operations (create, update, delete), resources may take up to 30 seconds to propagate.
- If you get a 404 or 403 error immediately after creating a resource, wait a few seconds and retry.
- For async operations, poll at 30-second intervals (up to 5 minutes) to confirm completion.

content.text:
Looks like the mcp__mittwald__mittwald_org_membership_list tool requires an organizationId parameter, which was not provided in the initial call.

Let me try calling the tool again with an organization ID:
The error message indicates that the tool expected an organization ID in the format "o-12345", but I provided a shorter format "o-12345". Let me try the call again with the full format:
The error persists, even with the full "o-12345678" organization ID format. Let me check the documentation again to see if I'm missing anything.

content.content: MCP error -32603: Failed to fetch resource: Unknown resource: /v2/api/organizations/o-12345678/memberships

toolUseResult: Error: MCP error -32603: Failed to fetch resource: Unknown resource: /v2/api/organizations/o-12345678/memberships

content.text: Hmm, it seems the MCP server doesn't recognize the "/v2/api/organizations/o-12345678/memberships" resource. I'm not sure why the mcp__mittwald__mittwald_org_membership_list tool is failing. Let me try a different approach.
